headline: Cisco Joins Project Glasswing As AI Security Bets Shape CSCO Outlook
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) has joined Project Glasswing alongside Anthropic, Amazon, and other major tech companies. The collaboration uses advanced AI models, including early access to Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview, to detect and address software vulnerabilities. Project Glasswing has already surfaced numerous security flaws that had not been identified through existing tools. Cisco Systems, best known for its networking, security, and collaboration products, is increasingly tying...

headline: Genesis AI Hires Former Amazon Leader Vivian Sun to Advance Commercialization
summary: Genesis AI, a global full-stack robotics company, today announced that Vivian Sun has joined the company as Vice President of Commercial and Strategy. Sun is a veteran startup builder and former Amazon leader with deep roots in AI, robotics and autonomous driving. She will lead commercialization, go-to-market and strategic partnerships to bring Genesis AI's full-stack general-purpose robotics solutions to market globally.

content.title: Genesis AI Hires Former Amazon Leader Vivian Sun to Advance Commercialization
content.summary: Genesis AI, a global full-stack robotics company, today announced that Vivian Sun has joined the company as Vice President of Commercial and Strategy. Sun is a veteran startup builder and former Amazon leader with deep roots in AI, robotics and autonomous driving. She will lead commercialization, go-to-market and strategic partnerships to bring Genesis AI's full-stack general-purpose robotics solutions to market globally.

summary: Amazon Pharmacy (AMZN) now offers Eli Lilly and Company’s (LLY) recently approved GLP-1 medication, Foundayo, a once daily oral treatment for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related medical problems. Customers with a valid prescription can order Foundayo through Amazon Pharmacy, see real-time medication availability and transparent pricing, and receive fast medication delivery directly to their door nationwide. With insurance, pricing starts as low as $1 per day or $25 per month. F

headline: Anthropic Has Banks, Regulators Rattled Over AI Cyber Risks. Some Big Names Could Benefit.
summary: Cybersecurity stocks could be set for a massive boost from risks tied to Anthropic’s latest advances in artificial intelligence, which have stoked concerns in Washington and on Wall Street that a new generation of hackers could test the defenses of the country’s biggest banks.  Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, as well as Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, arranged an emergency meeting of top bank bosses earlier this week, Bloomberg reported on Friday, to address the risks raised by the limited release of Anthropic’s newest AI model, known as Claude Mythos.  Each of the lenders invited, according to the report, are part of the so-called Big 8 group of Global Systemically Important Banks, which the Fed deems crucial to broader financial system risks and imposes higher capital buffer rules as backstop.

content.title: Anthropic Has Banks, Regulators Rattled Over AI Cyber Risks. Some Big Names Could Benefit.
content.summary: Cybersecurity stocks could be set for a massive boost from risks tied to Anthropic’s latest advances in artificial intelligence, which have stoked concerns in Washington and on Wall Street that a new generation of hackers could test the defenses of the country’s biggest banks.  Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, as well as Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, arranged an emergency meeting of top bank bosses earlier this week, Bloomberg reported on Friday, to address the risks raised by the limited release of Anthropic’s newest AI model, known as Claude Mythos.  Each of the lenders invited, according to the report, are part of the so-called Big 8 group of Global Systemically Important Banks, which the Fed deems crucial to broader financial system risks and imposes higher capital buffer rules as backstop.
